ground_truth.title: Best House Cleaning in El Cajon – Affordable & Trusted
ground_truth.author: Owner - WHB Cleaning
ground_truth.main_content:
El Cajon House Cleaning: How Much Should You Expect to Pay? If your home is around 1,700 square feet, a full cleaning typically costs between $150–$250, depending on your specific needs. At WHB Cleaning, we offer competitive pricing that beats the market — our Standard Cleaning Packages average 15% less than the industry norm, and our Deep Cleanings still come in 5–10% below most local competitors. Here's our simple pricing: Standard Cleaning – $49/hour. Move-In/Move-Out Cleaning – $55/hour. Want a deeper clean? You can easily add optional Deep Cleaning upgrades to any service. We proudly serve all of El Cajon, including Fletcher Hills, Cajon Heights, Cuyamaca Business Park, and surrounding neighborhoods. Ready for a fresh space? Request a custom quote today and we’ll send your time estimate and all-in pricing by text or email!

El Cajon's Premier House Cleaning Company. Life gets busy — and coming home to a messy house can make it feel even more overwhelming. If you're ready to enjoy a clean, stress-free space without lifting a finger, WHB Cleaning is here for you. We're proud to be El Cajon's go-to cleaning company, known for our friendly team, attention to detail, and consistent results. Whether it's a standard tidy-up or a detailed deep clean, our experienced pros have the tools and know-how to get the job done right. At WHB Cleaning, we believe a clean home helps you feel more relaxed and focused — so let us handle the cleaning while you spend time doing what matters most. Request a quote today and see why homeowners all over El Cajon trust WHB Cleaning. You deserve to come home to a space that feels fresh, organized, and totally stress-free.

Frequently Asked Questions: How long will the cleaning take? The average house cleaning in San Diego takes 3-4 hours based on the average size home of 1500 square feet! Do the cleaners bring their own supplies? Yes, all of our cleaners bring their own supplies. You don't have to provide anything! However, if there are special products that you prefer, our cleaners can use those products instead. Just let us know when you are booking your appointment! Do I need to be home while the cleaner is there? It's up to you. Some clients prefer to be home and some prefer not to be. If you're comfortable, you can give us the door code or leave a key somewhere hidden or in a lockbox. Rest assured, our cleaners have background checks. In over 5000 cleanings done, there have been no theft incidents. What happens if I am unhappy with the cleaning? Then we will send a cleaner back for free to finish what wasn't done properly or missed from the checklist! Report any issues to our customer service team 619-345-0043. We will immediately address the situation and arrange free touch ups! What is the hourly rate for house cleaning in San Diego? We charge only $49/hour or $55/hour + any Deep Cleaning add-ons you might want to add.
